name: Fraser Patterson
description: The only Australian friend I currently have, Fraser has an insane dedication to make things that help people. He understands that long-standing world issues can't go away with short-term solutions, and does his best to look for answers that will outlive him (and most of us). I trust him wholeheartedly, and I would like to see him achieve his vision. :)

thing.description: The Main Dude of Peaceful Foundation
